competitionRules.notes: 世界杯阵容页规则配置；如 FIFA 官方竞赛规程更新，可按赛季覆盖。

attendanceSource: FootyStats · 参加人数最多的比赛

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Lucas Paquetá (Brazil) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt blocked. Bruno Guimarães (Brazil) left footed shot from the right side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Rayan.

events.description: 吉马良斯射门被封堵。 拉延参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Brazil. Conceded by Shogo Taniguchi.
Vinícius Júnior (Brazil) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Attempt blocked. Bruno Guimarães (Brazil) left footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Douglas Santos.

events.description: 吉马良斯射门被封堵。 道格拉斯·桑托斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Vinícius Júnior (Brazil) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Kaishu Sano (Japan) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Attempt missed. Matheus Cunha (Brazil) left footed shot from outside the box is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Bruno Guimarães following a fast break.

events.description: 马特乌斯·库尼亚射门偏出。 吉马良斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Brazil. Conceded by Zion Suzuki.
Attempt missed. Bruno Guimarães (Brazil) right footed shot from the left side of the box misses to the right. Assisted by Lucas Paquetá following a corner.

events.description: 吉马良斯射门偏出。 卢卡斯·帕奎塔参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Casemiro (Brazil).
Casemiro (Brazil) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Attempt blocked. Daichi Kamada (Japan) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked.
Corner, Japan. Conceded by Casemiro.
Handball by Ayase Ueda (Japan).
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Corner, Japan. Conceded by Gabriel Magalhães.
Attempt missed. Ayase Ueda (Japan) header from the centre of the box is high and wide to the left. Assisted by Junya Ito with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 上田绮世射门偏出。 伊东纯也参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Goal! Brazil 0, Japan 1. Kaishu Sano (Japan) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner following a fast break.

events.description: 佐野海舟破门。 比分 0-1。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Ritsu Doan (Japan).
Douglas Santos (Brazil) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Offside, Brazil. Marquinhos is caught offside.
Attempt saved. Vinícius Júnior (Brazil) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Zion Suzuki (Japan). Assisted by Bruno Guimarães.

events.description: 维尼修斯射正。 吉马良斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Lucas Paquetá (Brazil) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Vinícius Júnior.

events.description: 卢卡斯·帕奎塔射门被封堵。 维尼修斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Matheus Cunha (Brazil) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Zion Suzuki (Japan). Assisted by Lucas Paquetá.

events.description: 马特乌斯·库尼亚射正。 卢卡斯·帕奎塔参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Junya Ito (Japan) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Daichi Kamada.

events.description: 伊东纯也射门被封堵。 镰田大地参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Bruno Guimarães (Brazil) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Daichi Kamada (Japan) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Brazil. Endrick replaces Lucas Paquetá because of an injury.

events.description: 恩德里克替补登场，换下卢卡斯·帕奎塔。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Lucas Paquetá (Brazil) header from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Marquinhos.

events.description: 卢卡斯·帕奎塔射门被封堵。 马尔基尼奥斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Fourth official has announced 4 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时4分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half ends, Brazil 0, Japan 1.
Second Half begins Brazil 0, Japan 1.
Handball by Ritsu Doan (Japan).
Foul by Danilo (Brazil).
Danilo (Brazil) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Foul by Matheus Cunha (Brazil).
Attempt saved. Bruno Guimarães (Brazil) header from the centre of the box is saved in the top centre of the goal by Zion Suzuki (Japan). Assisted by Danilo with a cross.

events.description: 吉马良斯射正。 达尼洛参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Endrick (Brazil) left footed shot from the centre of the box misses to the right. Assisted by Vinícius Júnior with a cross.

events.description: 恩德里克射门偏出。 维尼修斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Casemiro (Brazil) header from very close range is blocked. Assisted by Douglas Santos with a headed pass.

events.description: 卡塞米罗射门被封堵。 道格拉斯·桑托斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Goal! Brazil 1, Japan 1. Casemiro (Brazil) header from the right side of the six yard box to the top right corner. Assisted by Gabriel Magalhães with a cross.

events.description: 卡塞米罗破门。 比分 1-1。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Vinícius Júnior (Brazil) right footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Zion Suzuki (Japan). Assisted by Rayan.

events.description: 维尼修斯射正。 拉延参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Matheus Cunha (Brazil) right footed shot from outside the box is too high following a fast break.

events.description: 马特乌斯·库尼亚射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: Handball by Ayase Ueda (Japan).
Attempt saved. Ayase Ueda (Japan) right footed shot from the left side of the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Alisson Becker (Brazil). Assisted by Daizen Maeda.

events.description: 上田绮世射正。 前田大善参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Brazil. Gabriel Martinelli replaces Matheus Cunha.

events.description: 加布里埃尔·马丁内利替补登场，换下马特乌斯·库尼亚。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Japan. Junnosuke Suzuki replaces Keito Nakamura.

events.description: 铃木淳之介替补登场，换下中村敬斗。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Japan. Yukinari Sugawara replaces Ritsu Doan.

events.description: 菅原由势替补登场，换下杜安律。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Junya Ito (Japan) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 加布里埃尔·马丁内利犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Rayan (Brazil) header from the right side of the six yard box is blocked. Assisted by Gabriel Magalhães with a cross.

events.description: 拉延射门被封堵。 加布里埃尔·马加良斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Brazil. Conceded by Junnosuke Suzuki.
Attempt missed. Gabriel Martinelli (Brazil) right footed shot from outside the box is close, but misses to the right.

events.description: 加布里埃尔·马丁内利射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Japan. Shuto Machino replaces Junya Ito.

events.description: 町野修斗替补登场，换下伊东纯也。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Japan. Ao Tanaka replaces Daichi Kamada.

events.description: 田中青替补登场，换下镰田大地。

qualifiers.espnText: Danilo (Brazil) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Junnosuke Suzuki (Japan) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Corner, Brazil. Conceded by Junnosuke Suzuki.
Rayan (Brazil) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Attempt blocked. Vinícius Júnior (Brazil) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Gabriel Martinelli.

events.description: 维尼修斯射门被封堵。 加布里埃尔·马丁内利参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Brazil. Conceded by Kaishu Sano.
Vinícius Júnior (Brazil) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Delay in match because of an injury Casemiro (Brazil).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Brazil. Fabinho replaces Casemiro because of an injury.

events.description: 法比尼奥替补登场，换下卡塞米罗。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Brazil. Conceded by Shogo Taniguchi.
Attempt missed. Fabinho (Brazil) header from the centre of the box is high and wide to the right. Assisted by Bruno Guimarães with a cross following a corner.

events.description: 法比尼奥射门偏出。 吉马良斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Goal! Brazil 2, Japan 1. Gabriel Martinelli (Brazil) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Bruno Guimarães.

events.description: 加布里埃尔·马丁内利破门。 比分 2-1。

qualifiers.espnText: Fourth official has announced 6 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时6分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Japan. Koki Ogawa replaces Daizen Maeda.

events.description: 小川幸之助替补登场，换下前田大善。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Brazil. Danilo Santos replaces Bruno Guimarães.

events.description: 达尼洛桑托斯替补登场，换下吉马良斯。

qualifiers.espnText: Endrick (Brazil) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Marquinhos (Brazil) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Second Half ends, Brazil 2, Japan 1.

source.name: 懂球帝
source.note: 懂球帝公开比赛概览 tendencies.data；正值为主队攻势，负值为客队攻势。

summary.source: 懂球帝 App 公开数据层 + FIFA 公开赛事接口
summary.sourceNote: 历史记录来自懂球帝 App 公开全量球队赛历（含友谊赛），并以 FIFA 公开赛事接口交叉核验；每场均保留原始来源回链。

source.licenseNotice: 赛程、比分、阵容、事件和榜单来自本地 FIFA 官方公开 JSON 快照；生产展示仍需确认 FIFA 条款和授权边界。
